svg.title: SMC Short Setup: Liquidity Sweep + Break of Structure
svg.desc: Candlestick diagram showing a bearish SMC setup with equal highs, liquidity sweep above, and bearish break of structure
svg.text: Short setup — Liquidity sweep + Bearish BoS
① Equal highs vormen liquiditeitszone ② Sweep boven EQH ③ Bearish BoS → Short entry
